form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.84) at The Gardens in a Grade 5, finishing eighth and beaten 14 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and four places from eight starts. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (17.98) when sixth over 324m at Richmond Straight in a Grade 5. Starts from box 2 for the first time here. Makes strong appeal on best.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Wentworth Park (31.25) in a Grade 5, finishing a 16 length seventh. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and three places from seven starts. Others appear better placed.

form.formComment: Came from wide draw and finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 14 over 472m at Bulli behind Spencer Banner beaten 6 lengths (27.07). Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Ran a better race when third behind Send It Silver at Richmond Straight last start over 324m (17.75). Has good early speed and will stick on.

form.formComment: Just been plugging away and needs to improve after being unplaced in three tries. Last start 5th over 340m at Bulli. Prefer to watch at this stage.

form.formComment: Solid performance after tracking the speed to win by 1.75 lengths at The Gardens over 400m (23.01) beating Cerulean Moon in Grade 5 on April 18. Looks to have an edge on most of these.
